target:
Yeah, no problems.
We should be okay if we keep going.
Okay, then let the teachers come this way.
Hey, Straw. Can we keep going?
Something's coming at us really fast!

Yeah!
There was no presence at all before, but it caught up with us in a flash!
But it doesn't seem to have our exact position yet.

I see…
We need to get through somehow…

Teacher, be careful!
Haine's approaching from behind!

That's what I'm saying!
Haine's approaching from behind!

Who are you talking to?
Another straw again?
The straw said that… the kid was approaching…

A person in a red kimono…
That's the one who did this to my legs.

Red kimono?
What the hell, are you hurt by a human?

I can't believe it at all…
The wound on the monk's leg isn't something a human could do.
No matter how I look at it, it looks like it was torn apart by wild dogs.

Ryūnosuke, just stop talking.
We need to save our energy now.

Teacher, Haine is right behind us!
Hide!

Haine is probably nearby.
Let's hide for now--

W-what was that speed?!
It's not human!

If that person had such an inhuman movement,
it makes sense that they could injure the monk so badly.
Why… why did you attack Ryūnosuke?

N-no… no…
That wasn't me… I wasn't…
But I saw it… Haine attacking Ryūnosuke.

Why don't you understand?
Why attack Ryūnosuke without reason?

Get away!
Don't get any closer!
Nezu-san, blood's coming from your shoulder!
Monk… If danger approaches, carry him and head to the hospital immediately.

(If Ryūnosuke's in this condition…
We can't provoke Haine now)

(Stop it! If we don't do something,
not only Ryūnosuke but the teachers will be in danger!)

But at this distance,
we'll be caught no matter how we run.
If we could just stop Haine's movements…

No… better not.
It might just provoke it more.

Right! If the teacher can hear us,
maybe Haine can too!
We need to buy time with our voices!

That's probably the only way.
Yeah, let's try!

What are you doing!?
Get away from that thing!
It was going to eat the teacher!?

Haine!
Are you really going to do that!?

If you're trying to satisfy your hunger here,
is that really what you want!?

It's working…!
Our voices are reaching Haine!
I… I don't know who I am…

Aaaah! I don't know!
I don't know anything anymore!!

We can't go on like this!
Hizuru, run away quickly!

It's your birthday…
Why is this happening…!

I… I can't anymore.
That's why I did this…

I agree.
There's no way a little girl
could hold me back.

Did you see how she moved?
It's not normal…!

Certainly…
The same as the shadow we fought earlier.
There's a possibility.

Rootzu-san… Please…
If something happens to my older sister…

What are you saying!
There's no way we can leave Ryunosuke behind!

Understood.
Leave the rest to me.

Put me down!
Put me down!!

Be quiet!
If everyone gets killed, you want to ruin the priest's feelings?!

In the end, I'm powerless.
I can't change anything…
Hey, Shinpei! This isn't the time to cry!
We're definitely not powerless! If we get scared, everything will end!
There might still be things we need to see and confirm.
Yeah, let's follow the teacher and Rootzu.
With the time Ryunosuke gave us, I need to see the future of Hizuru and Rootzu.
